_meta.purpose: Fixed evaluation baseline for the Step 6 RAG Document Ingestion Spike. Do not edit answers/expectations casually once retrieval/citation testing begins against this baseline -- treat changes the same as changing a test oracle.
_meta.schema_version_note: Sub-step 7 (Retrieval Evaluation Dataset Expansion) added: retrieval_eval_eligible (bool), eligibility_reason (string, present only when retrieval_eval_eligible=false), expected_content_keywords (list of literal substrings that must appear in the FULL stored chunk text -- never a truncated preview -- for exact_content_correctness to pass; an empty list means this question is not gradable for content correctness), expected_chunk_type ('table'|'prose'|null), retrieval_target ('single_chunk'|'multi_chunk'|null), expected_locations (list, only for retrieval_target='multi_chunk' questions -- documents where each individual keyword's ground truth actually lives, since a single expected_location would be misleading when the answer spans multiple chunks/pages), false_positive_control (bool -- true for questions designed to confirm the hybrid scorer's date/table boosts do not fire when they shouldn't).
_meta.page_reference_status_note: q06, q11, q02, q15, and all of q18-q29 have been rigorously re-verified this session (Sub-step 7) by reading the actual stored chunk text in spike_document_chunks (for doc1/doc3, which are ingested) or by running spike.pdf_parser / spike.chunker directly against the real PDF (for doc4, which is NOT ingested -- see retrieval_eval_eligible). All other questions' pdf_page_number values are the original page='N' citations captured during Sub-step 1 document review; they are believed accurate but were not independently re-verified this round, so their expected_content_keywords are left as an empty list rather than guessed -- re-verifying them is a follow-up item, not done in this round.

documents.doc4: A 完整版本  鋰電池二次利用之電池管理系統開發研究完成報告.pdf

ingestion_status.doc2: NOT ingested -- never selected for the embedding spike (Sub-step 4 only chose doc1+doc3)
ingestion_status.doc4: NOT ingested -- ground truth for its questions is content-verified this round (real PDF text / real chunker output), but retrieval_eval_eligible=false for all of them until a future sub-step actually ingests it

verification_tiers.verified: The expected_location and/or expected_answer_points were re-checked this session by actually running code against the real document/OCR output/DB chunk text (not memory). Only these questions may be used to compute a formal answer-completeness accuracy metric.
verification_tiers.partially_verified: Grounded in a full document read performed during Sub-step 1, but not re-checked with code this session. Usable for manual/qualitative observation only, not for a formal accuracy number.
verification_tiers.unverified: Negative or capability-boundary questions with no specific expected_location to check mechanically; correctness is behavioral (does the system decline appropriately) rather than fact-matching, and has not been re-verified this session.

_meta.retrieval_eval_eligible_note: 15 includes q05 and q13, which are eligible ONLY for the false-positive signal-firing check (hybrid ranking must equal vector-only ranking) -- they have no expected_content_keywords and are never graded for hit@k. The count of questions eligible for full hit@k/exact-content grading is 13 (q02, q06, q11, q18-q26, q29).

Kept ineligible per instruction not to flip eligibility on a failing question.

questions.question: 依鋰電池BMS報告的電池保護邏輯知識，低碳綠能儲能整合報告中的「儲能未作動」事件，有沒有可能是電池保護機制（過熱、SOH過低）所致？
questions.expected_answer_points: 需區分：BMS 報告確實提到高溫/SOH過低會觸發保護機制（一般背景知識）；但低碳綠能儲能整合報告本身未提供這些事件當下的電池溫度或SOH數據，因此不能確認，只能列為可能原因並標示證據缺口
questions.expected_behavior_if_insufficient_eviden: 直接測試四層結構（一般知識 vs 案場證據）分離能力；此題為核心測試題

questions.verification_note: Verified in Sub-step 8 Phase 1 via spike.chunker.chunk_document run directly against the real PDF (no ingestion): the exact literal text is '實際可用能量落在1.4–1.6kWh 之間' (en-dash between 1.4 and 1.6, no space). Re-confirmed after Sub-step 8 Phase 2 ingestion against the real stored chunk (chunk_id prefix aa7b66058d4c, pdf_page_number 111): vector-only and hybrid retrieval both rank it #2, giving hit_at_3/hit_at_5 = true (hit_at_1 = false) in both document_scoped and global scope.

questions.question: 若將 Gogoro 退役電池擴展至 8–12 顆以上，可形成多大規模的儲能系統？
questions.expected_answer_points: 可形成 10kWh 級的儲能規模，足以支撐家庭日常再生能源調節或數小時至一整晚的用電需求

expected_location.section_title: 4.7 梯次利用電池用於家用儲能

questions.verification_note: Verified in Sub-step 8 Phase 1 via spike.chunker.chunk_document run directly against the real PDF. The real text contains a mid-word line break ('儲能規\n模') from PDF extraction, so '10kWh 級的儲能規模' as a single keyword would NOT match -- expected_content_keywords deliberately uses '10kWh' and '8–12 顆' separately to avoid that pitfall. Re-confirmed after Sub-step 8 Phase 2 ingestion against the real stored chunk (chunk_id prefix baab13eca55d, pdf_page_number 112, contains both keywords): vector-only and hybrid retrieval both rank it #3, giving hit_at_3/hit_at_5 = true (hit_at_1 = false) in both document_scoped and global scope.
